{"society_power": 6.0, "state_power": 5.0, "society_change": 0.5, "state_change": 0.5, "key_event": "UN trusteeship builds proto-state; elections mobilize clan-based parties", "reasoning": "The AFIS trusteeship deliberately built central administrative and fiscal institutions and progressively \"Somalized\" the civil service, modestly strengthening a still aid-dependent, interior-thin state; meanwhile municipal and 1956 legislative elections plus the SYL's rise channeled the persistent clan \"cage of norms\" into organized representative politics, boosting society's institutional voice."}
